prompts: A realistic video of a Texas Hold'em poker event. A male player in his late 30s with a medium build, short dark hair, light stubble, and a sharp jawline wears a fitted navy blazer over a charcoal crew-neck tee, dark jeans, and a stainless-steel watch. He sits at a well-lit poker table and tightly grips his hole cards, wearing a tense, serious expression.  The table is filled with chips of various colors, the dealer is seen dealing cards, and several rows of slot machines glow in the background. The camera focuses on the player's strained concentration. Wide shot to medium close-up.

Hard cut to a vast, frozen Arctic landscape. The same man, still in his navy blazer and charcoal tee, is now sitting at a table made of solid ice amidst a blizzard. He flicks his poker cards onto the snow-covered surface and leans back in celebration. Camera: Wide shot capturing the contrast between his formal attire and the lethal cold.

Sudden transition to a rainy, neon-drenched cyberpunk rooftop at night. The same man reveals a winning hand of holographic glowing cards. Background: flying vehicles and massive digital billboards. He leans back as a robotic dealer moves in the background. Camera: Low-angle cinematic shot.

The scene shifts instantly to a sun-drenched underwater ancient temple. The same man sits upright at a stone altar, methodically arranging stacks of gold coins (instead of chips). Bubbles rise from his mouth as he maintains a composed, purposeful look. Camera: Slow motion, capturing the fabric of his navy blazer waving in the water.

A jump-cut to a surreal, white minimalist void. The same man breaks into a proud, self-assured smile. Floating multicolored poker chips orbit around him like planets. There is no floor, only a soft glow. Camera: Close-up on his sharp jawline and the reflection on his stainless-steel watch.

Final transition to a high-tech space station observation deck. The same man shares a celebratory high-five with a glowing translucent alien patron. Through the massive curved window, the Earth is visible in the background. Camera: Wide shot focusing on the jubilant, cross-species interaction.
